title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering is the discipline of designing the wrapper and orchestration layer around LLMs and coding agents. It involves two levels: first, the AI layer for a single session including rules, skills, and subagents; second, orchestrating multiple focused agent sessions into reliable workflows for larger tasks.
